creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #26)

There is a discussion about this in PR#191442 as well.

Since there are API changes (can someone verify this?) we problably need to make current ports depend on the old sqlalchemy07, and hint maintainers of individiual ports to verify that they work with a newer version?

I'd like to see this happen. How can I help?
